landmarks.title: Fantasy talk
landmarks.eventCopy: Talk openly about fantasies you've each been curious about.

landmarks.title: Watch together
landmarks.eventCopy: Watch something with a charge to it, together, and talk about it after.

landmarks.title: Virtual hellos
landmarks.eventCopy: Video-call with someone you're both curious about, together — low stakes, just seeing how it feels.

landmarks.title: The strip club
landmarks.eventCopy: Go to a strip club together. Start with no lap dance; if it feels right, a lap dance. You're learning what it's like to watch each other enjoy the room.
landmarks.goldenRule: You leave together, and the night stays about the two of you.

landmarks.title: Flirt at a bar
landmarks.eventCopy: Flirt with someone else, together, in a low-stakes public setting.
landmarks.goldenRule: Nothing happens without checking in with each other first.

landmarks.title: An NM mixer
landmarks.eventCopy: Attend a non-monogamy social event together, just to see who's out there.
landmarks.goldenRule: You can leave at any point, no explanation needed.

landmarks.title: Lifestyle club
landmarks.eventCopy: Visit a lifestyle club together, as an evening out — no pressure to participate beyond watching and talking.
landmarks.goldenRule: Watching only, unless you both explicitly agree otherwise in the moment.

landmarks.title: Seen, as a couple
landmarks.eventCopy: Let another couple see you two together — a dinner, a party, anywhere your dynamic is visible to people who know.

landmarks.title: Dinner with a couple
landmarks.eventCopy: Have dinner with another couple you're both interested in getting to know.

landmarks.title: Same room
landmarks.eventCopy: Parallel play — in the same room as another couple, each pair with each other.
landmarks.goldenRule: Check in with each other, not just once, throughout.

landmarks.title: Soft swap
landmarks.eventCopy: Everything but penetrative sex, with another couple, same room.
landmarks.goldenRule: Any hard limit named beforehand stays a hard limit in the moment.

landmarks.title: Full swap
landmarks.eventCopy: The full experience, with another couple, by mutual agreement.
landmarks.goldenRule: The safe word ends the night for both couples immediately, no discussion needed.

landmarks.title: A solo night
landmarks.eventCopy: One of you goes it alone — your paths split here, by design.
